style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a small robot token labelled AGENT A inside a box labelled CONTEXT WINDOW shown nearly full with stacked lines. An arrow crosses a vertical dotted boundary labelled CONTEXT CLEARED to a second robot token labelled AGENT B on the right. Between them sits a small document icon labelled DECISION LEDGER + ARCHITECTURE SPEC with an arrow feeding into AGENT B. A small caption below reads RESUME WITHOUT DRIFT. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens.
composed_prompt:
